title: BEM-551 production readiness autotest
objective: Run production readiness autotest for autonomous development system. Check: curator-intake.yml exists and workflow_dispatch only; role-orchestrator.yml valid structure and script exists; provider-adapter.yml has provider_probe_result/provider_selection_decision/provider_selection_audit and no schedule; telegram picker/recorder/workflows exist and stale queue policy exists; contour_status.json says BEM-550 completed 10/10; transport contains BEM-550.3 through BEM-550.10 records; no workflow uses issue #31; no forbidden schedule except curator-hourly-report.yml. Write governance/reports/bem551_production_readiness_autotest.md and proof with verdict READY_CONTROLLED_REAL_TASKS or BLOCKER. No issue comments.
